cause_analysis.narrative: HollywoodSoulSalon Ouchlesshairbraiding churned on 2026-03-12 after 146 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2026-02-11 via phone_call — 29 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 29 day(s) before churn via phone_call. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
